recruiter.bio: Junior Full Stack Developer III and team lead at AGX Software (Sorocaba): React, TypeScript, Node.js and MongoDB for scalable web systems.
recruiter.aboutExtended: Systems Analysis and Development student at Anhembi Morumbi. At AGX Software since Jul 2024 — from front-end internship to Junior Full Stack III with team leadership. I build with React, TypeScript, Sass, Node.js and MongoDB, combining technical delivery with mentorship, code review and business alignment.
